requirement_topic.en: SONABEL Grid Connection for BESS — 220/380 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and ARSE Project Authorisation
requirement_topic.zh: SONABEL BESS并网——220/380 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及ARSE项目授权
requirement_topic.zht: SONABEL BESS併網——220/380 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及ARSE項目授權

summary.en: SONABEL (Société Nationale Burkinabè d'Électricité) is the national electricity utility in Burkina Faso, responsible for electricity generation, transmission, and distribution. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale projects, C&I behind-the-meter storage, and solar-hybrid systems feeding the national grid — require SONABEL technical review and grid-connection approval as well as an ARSE (Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie) production licence or authorisation. Burkina Faso's grid operates at 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz — nominally the same voltage levels as China's grid, but protection relay settings, voltage ride-through requirements, frequency deviation tolerance, and communication/SCADA protocols used in practice are specific to SONABEL's network and project-level specifications. Grid-connected BESS projects in Burkina Faso are predominantly donor-funded (World Bank, AFD, AfDB) or developed by IPPs; project specifications in such contexts reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards, including IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2, as technical prerequisites. No publicly accessible SONABEL technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from SONABEL and ARSE.
summary.zh: SONABEL（布基纳法索国家电力公司）是布基纳法索国家电力公司，负责发电、输电和配电。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模项目、工商业表后储能及向国家电网供电的太阳能混合系统——均须取得SONABEL技术审查和并网批准，以及ARSE（能源监管机构）的生产许可证或授权。布基纳法索电网在50 Hz下运行于单相220 V和三相380 V——与中国电网标称电压相同，但实际使用的保护继电器设定值、电压穿越要求、频率偏差容限及通信/SCADA协议均特定于SONABEL网络和项目级规格。布基纳法索并网BESS项目以捐助方资助（世界银行、AFD、非开行）或IPP开发为主；此类背景下的项目规格引用IEC 62933（储能系统）系列标准（包括IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2）作为技术前提。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认SONABEL公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向SONABEL和ARSE获取。
summary.zht: SONABEL（布吉納法索國家電力公司）是布吉納法索國家電力公司，負責發電、輸電和配電。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模項目、工商業表後儲能及向國家電網供電的太陽能混合系統——均須取得SONABEL技術審查和併網批准，以及ARSE（能源監管機構）的生產許可證或授權。布吉納法索電網在50 Hz下運行於單相220 V和三相380 V——與中國電網標稱電壓相同，但實際使用的保護繼電器設定值、電壓穿越要求、頻率偏差容限及通訊/SCADA協議均特定於SONABEL網絡和項目級規格。布吉納法索併網BESS項目以捐助方資助（世界銀行、AFD、非開行）或IPP開發為主；此類背景下的項目規格引用IEC 62933（儲能系統）系列標準（包括IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2）作為技術前提。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認SONABEL公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向SONABEL和ARSE獲取。

standards_or_laws: SONABEL grid-connection technical requirements — project-level connection agreement; no publicly confirmed BESS-specific technical specification as of dataset date
ARSE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie (Burkina Faso energy regulatory authority): production licence or authorisation required for BESS above defined capacity threshold
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Loi n° 014-2017/AN portant réglementation du secteur de l'énergie au Burkina Faso (Energy Sector Regulation Law — primary legal framework for electricity generation licensing)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. Both China and Burkina Faso operate at 220/380 V 50 Hz nominally, meaning PCS voltage hardware configuration may be directly compatible; however, protection relay settings, reactive power compensation targets, anti-islanding parameters, and SCADA communication protocols must be reconfigured to match SONABEL's network-specific requirements and donor/lender technical specifications. NEA grid approvals issued in China have no standing with SONABEL or ARSE.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国和布基纳法索标称均运行于220/380 V 50 Hz，意味着PCS电压硬件配置可能直接兼容；但保护继电器设定值、无功补偿目标、防孤岛参数及SCADA通信协议须重新配置，以符合SONABEL网络专属要求和捐助方/贷款方技术规格。中国签发的NEA并网审批对SONABEL或ARSE不具效力。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國和布吉納法索標稱均運行於220/380 V 50 Hz，意味著PCS電壓硬件配置可能直接兼容；但保護繼電器設定值、無功補償目標、防孤島參數及SCADA通訊協議須重新配置，以符合SONABEL網絡專屬要求和捐助方/貸款方技術規格。中國簽發的NEA併網審批對SONABEL或ARSE不具效力。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals have no standing with SONABEL or ARSE. Although both grids nominally share 220/380 V at 50 Hz — reducing PCS hardware voltage-adaptation risk compared to Middle East markets — the following gaps remain: (a) ARSE production licence or authorisation — obtain early; threshold capacity triggers and procedure timelines are project-specific; (b) SONABEL project-specific connection agreement — engage SONABEL at the earliest project stage to obtain technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — donor/lender and project-owner specifications reference IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalents; (d) Protection and stability parameters — SONABEL's network in Burkina Faso includes significant solar-hybrid penetration and isolated/island-mode segments; anti-islanding, ride-through, and reactive power settings must be configured for local grid stability conditions, not China grid parameters; (e) Communication/SCADA protocol — confirm the protocol required by SONABEL for BESS monitoring and dispatch (IEC 61850, Modbus, or project-specific); (f) High-temperature derating — ambient temperatures in Burkina Faso regularly exceed 45 °C; PCS and battery thermal management must be validated for this environment.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批对SONABEL或ARSE不具效力。尽管两国电网标称均为220/380 V 50 Hz——相比中东市场降低了PCS硬件电压适配风险——但以下差距仍然存在：（a）ARSE生产许可证或授权——尽早获取；容量阈值触发条件和程序时限因项目而异；（b）SONABEL项目专属并网协议——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与SONABEL接触以获取技术要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——捐助方/贷款方和项目业主规格引用IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）保护和稳定性参数——SONABEL在布基纳法索的网络包含大量太阳能混合渗透和孤立/孤岛模式段；防孤岛、穿越及无功功率设定须针对本地电网稳定条件配置，而非中国电网参数；（e）通信/SCADA协议——确认SONABEL对BESS监控和调度所要求的协议（IEC 61850、Modbus或项目专属）；（f）高温降额——布基纳法索环境温度定期超过45 °C；PCS和电池热管理须针对此环境进行验证。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批對SONABEL或ARSE不具效力。儘管兩國電網標稱均為220/380 V 50 Hz——相比中東市場降低了PCS硬件電壓適配風險——但以下差距仍然存在：（a）ARSE生產許可證或授權——盡早獲取；容量閾值觸發條件和程序時限因項目而異；（b）SONABEL項目專屬併網協議——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與SONABEL接觸以獲取技術要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——捐助方/貸款方和項目業主規格引用IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）保護和穩定性參數——SONABEL在布吉納法索的網絡包含大量太陽能混合滲透和孤立/孤島模式段；防孤島、穿越及無功功率設定須針對本地電網穩定條件配置，而非中國電網參數；（e）通訊/SCADA協議——確認SONABEL對BESS監控和調度所要求的協議（IEC 61850、Modbus或項目專屬）；（f）高溫降額——布吉納法索環境溫度定期超過45 °C；PCS和電池熱管理須針對此環境進行驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARSE production licence and SONABEL grid-connection approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Burkina Faso; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in the SONABEL connection agreement and ARSE authorisation conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Burkina Faso

source.publisher: ARSE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie (Burkina Faso Energy Regulatory Authority)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy SONABEL or ARSE requirements in Burkina Faso. The nominal voltage match (220/380 V 50 Hz) reduces hardware adaptation risk but does not eliminate the need for ARSE project licensing, SONABEL connection agreement compliance, IEC 62933 evidence for donor/lender projects, or protection parameter reconfiguration for SONABEL's solar-hybrid network conditions. Engage ARSE and SONABEL at the earliest project stage. For donor-financed projects (World Bank, AFD, AfDB), verify lender technical standards independently as they may impose stricter IEC-based requirements than national regulations alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足布基纳法索SONABEL或ARSE要求。标称电压一致（220/380 V 50 Hz）降低了硬件适配风险，但并不免除ARSE项目许可、SONABEL并网协议合规、捐助方/贷款方项目IEC 62933证据或针对SONABEL太阳能混合网络条件重新配置保护参数的要求。应在项目最早阶段与ARSE和SONABEL接触。对于捐助方资助项目（世界银行、AFD、非开行），须独立核实贷款方技术标准，因其可能比单纯国家法规施加更严格的IEC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足布吉納法索SONABEL或ARSE要求。標稱電壓一致（220/380 V 50 Hz）降低了硬件適配風險，但並不免除ARSE項目許可、SONABEL併網協議合規、捐助方/貸款方項目IEC 62933證據或針對SONABEL太陽能混合網絡條件重新配置保護參數的要求。應在項目最早階段與ARSE和SONABEL接觸。對於捐助方資助項目（世界銀行、AFD、非開行），須獨立核實貸款方技術標準，因其可能比單純國家法規施加更嚴格的IEC要求。
